---
title: "160 Project"
author: "jolie croissant"
date: "2026-03-01"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
icu_path <- "~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/icu/"
hosp_path <- "~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/"

list.files(icu_path)
list.files(hosp_path)
icu_stays <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/icu/icustays.csv.gz")
patients <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/patients.csv.gz")
admissions <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/admissions.csv.gz")
omr_data <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/omr.csv.gz")
diagnoses_dictionary <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/d_icd_diagnoses.csv.gz")
diagnoses <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/diagnoses_icd.csv.gz")
procedures <- read_csv("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/procedures_icd.csv.gz")
fio2_df <- fread("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/icu/fio2_only.csv", select = c(1, 2, 3, 5, 9), 
                  col.names = c("subject_id", "hadm_id", "stay_id", "charttime", "fio2_val"))
labs_df <- fread("~/physionet.org/files/mimiciv/3.1/hosp/labs_cci.csv", select = c(2, 3, 7, 9, 5), 
                  col.names = c("subject_id", "hadm_id", "charttime", "valuenum", "itemid"))

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)
analysis_df <- diagnoses %>%
  group_by(subject_id) %>%
  summarize(
    is_septic = any(
      icd_code %in% c("99591", "99592", "R652", "R6520", "R6521") | 
      startsWith(icd_code, "A40") | 
      startsWith(icd_code, "A41") |
      startsWith(icd_code, "T8144")
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(is_septic = as.numeric(is_septic)) %>%
  right_join(omr_data, by = "subject_id") %>%
  mutate(is_septic = replace_na(is_septic, 0))

  analysis_df <- analysis_df %>%
  mutate(is_obese = ifelse(result_value >= 30, 1, 0))
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(comorbidity)
diagnoses <- as.data.frame(diagnoses)

cci_data <- comorbidity(x = diagnoses, 
                       id = "subject_id", 
                        code = "icd_code", 
                        map = "charlson_icd10_quan", 
                        assign0 = TRUE)
rm(diagnoses)
cci_data$cci_score <- score(cci_data, weights = "charlson", assign0= TRUE)
cci_data <- cci_data %>% select(subject_id, cci_score) %>% distinct()

analysis_df <- analysis_df %>%
  left_join(cci_data, by = "subject_id") %>%
  mutate(cci_score = replace_na(cci_score, 0))

summary(analysis_df$cci_score)
```


```{r}
vent_codes <- c("9670", "9671", "9672", "5A1935Z", "5A1945Z", "5A1955Z")
setDT(procedures)
procedures[, icd_clean := gsub("\\.", "", icd_code)]
vent_subjects <- procedures[icd_clean %in% vent_codes, list(is_vent = 1), by = subject_id]
vent_subjects <- unique(vent_subjects)

outcomes <- admissions[, c("subject_id", "hadm_id", "hospital_expire_flag")]
colnames(outcomes)[colnames(outcomes) == "hospital_expire_flag"] <- "mortality"
setDT(admissions)
stay_info <- admissions[, .(subject_id, hadm_id, admittime, mortality = hospital_expire_flag)]

analysis_df <- analysis_df %>%
  inner_join(stay_info, by = "subject_id")

setDT(analysis_df)
analysis_df[, days_from_adm := as.numeric(abs(difftime(chartdate, admittime, units = "days")))]

final_df <- merge(analysis_df, vent_subjects, by = "subject_id", all.x = TRUE)
final_df[is.na(is_vent), is_vent := 0]

final_df <- final_df[order(subject_id, days_from_adm)] 
final_df <- final_df[, head(.SD, 1), by = .(subject_id, hadm_id)]

final_df <- final_df[order(subject_id, -mortality, -admittime)]
final_df <- final_df[, head(.SD, 1), by = subject_id]
rm(analysis_df)
rm(final_analysis_unique)
rm(omr_data)
rm(procedures)
```

```{r}
patients <- patients %>%
  select(subject_id, gender, anchor_age)

final_df <- final_df %>%
  left_join(patients, by = "subject_id") %>%
  rename(age = anchor_age, sex = gender)

final_df <- final_df %>%
  mutate(sex = ifelse(sex == "M", 1, 0))

final_df <- final_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(age))
```



Matrix Preparation:

```{r}
library(grf)
library(data.table)

setDT(final_df)

X_vars <- c("age", "sex", "cci_score", "is_septic", "is_vent")
X <- as.matrix(final_df[, ..X_vars])

Y <- as.numeric(final_df$mortality)
W <- as.numeric(final_df$is_obese)
```


Causal Forest Fitting:

```{r}
set.seed(7)
library(grf)

# 1. Fit the Causal Forest
# This builds the 'forest' that estimates the Obesity Paradox
c_forest <- causal_forest(
  X = X, 
  Y = Y, 
  W = W, 
  num.trees = 2000,        # More trees = more stable results
  tune.parameters = "all"  # Automatically optimizes the model
)

# 2. Extract the CATE (Conditional Average Treatment Effect)
# This is the "Obesity Paradox Score" for every individual patient
# Following your reference style:
final_df[, cate := c_forest$predictions]

# 3. Calculate the Average Treatment Effect (ATE)
# This provides the overall 'Total Effect' you saw earlier
ate <- average_treatment_effect(c_forest, target.sample = "all")

print(paste("The Average Treatment Effect (ATE) is:", round(ate["estimate"], 4)))
print(paste("95% Confidence Interval Standard Error:", round(ate["std.err"], 4)))

```
```{r}
calibration <- test_calibration(c_forest)
print(calibration)

var_imp <- variable_importance(c_forest)
importance_df <- data.frame(Variable = X_vars, Importance = as.vector(var_imp))
importance_df[order(-importance_df$Importance), ]
print("CATE Summary:")
summary(final_df$cate)

# Check the standard deviation
print(paste("CATE SD:", round(sd(final_df$cate), 6)))
```
```{r}
set.seed(7)
c_forest_flexible <- causal_forest(
  X = X, 
  Y = Y, 
  W = W, 
  num.trees = 4000,
  min.node.size = 5, 
  tune.parameters = "all"
)
ate_flex <- average_treatment_effect(c_forest_flexible, target.sample = "all")

print(paste("The Average Treatment Effect (ATE) is:", round(ate_flex["estimate"], 4)))
print(paste("95% Confidence Interval Standard Error:", round(ate_flex["std.err"], 4)))
# Extract new CATE scores
final_df[, cate_flex := c_forest_flexible$predictions]

# Check if the range has widened
print("New CATE Summary (Flexible Forest):")
summary(final_df$cate_flex)

# Check the new standard deviation
print(paste("New CATE SD:", sd(final_df$cate_flex)))

```

```{r}
new_calibration <- test_calibration(c_forest_flexible)
print(new_calibration)

new_var_imp <- variable_importance(c_forest_flexible)
new_importance_df <- data.frame(Variable = X_vars, Importance = as.vector(new_var_imp))
new_importance_df[order(-importance_df$Importance), ]


# Check the standard deviation
sd(final_df$cate)
sd(final_df$cate_flex)
```

Introducing New Factors:
```{r}
library(lubridate)
fio2_df <- fio2_df[order(charttime), .(fio2 = first(fio2_val)), by = hadm_id]
labs_df <- labs_df[itemid %in% c(50821, 50862)]
labs_df <- labs_df[, .(lab_val = first(valuenum)), by = .(hadm_id, itemid)]
labs_df <- dcast(labs_df, hadm_id ~ itemid, value.var = "lab_val")
setnames(labs_df, old = c("50821", "50862"), new = c("pao2", "albumin"), skip_absent = TRUE)

final_df <- final_df %>%
  left_join(fio2_df, by = "hadm_id") %>%
  left_join(labs_df, by = "hadm_id")

final_df <- final_df %>%
  mutate(
    # 1. Convert to numeric
    pao2 = as.numeric(pao2),
    fio2 = as.numeric(fio2),
    albumin = as.numeric(as.character(albumin)),
    fio2 = ifelse(fio2 < 21 | is.na(fio2), 21, fio2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    fio2_fixed = ifelse(fio2 <= 1, fio2 * 100, fio2),
    pf_ratio = pao2 / (fio2_fixed / 100)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pf_ratio = ifelse(pf_ratio > 500, 500, pf_ratio),
    pf_ratio = ifelse(is.na(pf_ratio), 400, pf_ratio)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pf_ratio = ifelse(is.na(pf_ratio), median(pf_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), pf_ratio),
    albumin = ifelse(is.na(albumin), median(albumin, na.rm = TRUE), albumin)
  )

summary(final_df$pf_ratio)

```

Final Causal Forest Fitting
```{r}
library(grf)
set.seed(7)


x_vars <- c("age", "sex", "cci_score", "pf_ratio", "albumin", "is_septic", "is_vent")

# 2. Create the matrices
x <- as.matrix(final_df[, ..x_vars])
y <- as.numeric(final_df$mortality)
w <- as.numeric(final_df$is_obese)


causalf_model <- causal_forest(X = x, 
  Y = y, 
  W = w, 
  num.trees = 4000,
  min.node.size = 5, 
  tune.parameters = "all")

ate_final <- average_treatment_effect(causalf_model, target.sample = "all")

print(paste("The Average Treatment Effect (ATE):", round(ate_final["estimate"], 4)))
print(paste("95% Confidence Interval Standard Error:", round(ate_final["std.err"], 4)))

check_importance <- variable_importance(causalf_model)
names(check_importance) <- x_vars
print(sort(check_importance, decreasing = TRUE))
test_calibration(causalf_model)

final_df[, cate_final := causalf_model$predictions]

# Check if the range has widened
print("Final CATE Summary:")
summary(final_df$cate_final)

# Check the new standard deviation
print(paste("Final CATE SD:", sd(final_df$cate_final)))
```


```{r}

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(final_df, aes(x = cci_score, y = cate_final)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Is the Obesity Paradox stronger in sicker patients?",
       x = "CCI",
       y = "Predicted Benefit of Obesity (CATE)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(final_df, aes(x = is_septic, y = cate_final)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Is the Obesity Paradox stronger in septic patients?",
       x = "is_septic",
       y = "Predicted Benefit of Obesity (CATE)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(final_df, aes(x = albumin, y = cate_final)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Is the Obesity Paradox stronger in malnutrition cases?",
       x = "albumin",
       y = "Predicted Benefit of Obesity (CATE)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(final_df, aes(x = is_vent, y = cate_final)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Is the Obesity Paradox stronger in ventilated patients?",
       x = "albumin",
       y = "Predicted Benefit of Obesity (CATE)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(final_df, aes(x = cate_final)) +
  geom_density(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = -0.01, y = 50, label = "Protective (Paradox)") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.02, y = 50, label = "Harmful") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of the Obesity Paradox Effect",
       x = "Predicted Effect on Mortality (CATE)",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
res_dt <- as.data.table(final_df)

cci_te <- res_dt[, list(
    zte = mean(is_obese), 
    dev = sd(is_obese) / sqrt(.N), 
    cnt = .N
  ), by = c("cci_score")]


albumin_te <- res_dt[, list(
    zte = mean(is_obese), 
    dev = sd(is_obese) / sqrt(.N), 
    cnt = .N
  ), by = c("albumin")]

pf_te <- res_dt[, list(
    zte = mean(is_obese), 
    dev = sd(is_obese) / sqrt(.N), 
    cnt = .N
  ), by = c("pf_ratio")]

ggplot(cci_te[cnt > 10], aes(x = cci_score, y = zte)) + 
  geom_line(color = "firebrick", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "firebrick") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = zte - 1.96 * dev, ymax = zte + 1.96 * dev), alpha = 0.2, fill = "firebrick") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Obesity Benefit by Comorbidity Burden",
       subtitle = "Values below 0 indicate Obesity is Protective",
       x = "Charlson Comorbidity Index",
       y = "Average Treatment Effect (CATE)")

ggplot(albumin_te[cnt > 10], aes(x = albumin, y = zte)) + 
  geom_line(color = "firebrick", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "firebrick") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = zte - 1.96 * dev, ymax = zte + 1.96 * dev), alpha = 0.2, fill = "firebrick") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Obesity Benefit by Nutrition Level",
       subtitle = "Values below 0 indicate Obesity is Protective",
       x = "Albumin Value",
       y = "Average Treatment Effect (CATE)")

ggplot(pf_te[cnt > 10], aes(x = pf_ratio, y = zte)) + 
  geom_line(color = "firebrick", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "firebrick") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = zte - 1.96 * dev, ymax = zte + 1.96 * dev), alpha = 0.2, fill = "firebrick") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Obesity Benefit by PF Ratio",
       subtitle = "Values below 0 indicate Obesity is Protective",
       x = "PF Ratio",
       y = "Average Treatment Effect (CATE)")

```


```{r}
ggplot(final_df, aes(x = albumin, color = factor(is_obese))) +
  stat_ecdf() + theme_bw() + 
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Obese", labels = c("no", "yes"))
```
